name: DNS HybridConnectionManager Service Bus
notes:
This is rule detects Hybrid Connection Manager querying the service bus.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: DNS HybridConnectionManager Service Bus
SIGMA Description: Detects Azure Hybrid Connection Manager services querying the Azure service bus service


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.DNS In Progress
when the event matches LOWER("URL Host") LIKE '%servicebus.windows.net%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%hybridconnectionmanager%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DNS HybridConnectionManager Service Bus on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.DNS In Progress
AND when the event matches LOWER("URL Host") LIKE '%servicebus.windows.net%' AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%hybridconnectionmanager%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DNS HybridConnectionManager Service Bus
Event description: Detects Hybrid Connection Manager querying the service bus.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
